title: Closed: Immigrate through the Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot - Canada.ca
content:
## Closed: Immigrate through the Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot
The Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot (EMPP) helped skilled refugees and other displaced people immigrate to Canada.
There were 2 ways you could have applied for the EMPP:
- through one of 2 regional economic programs
- directly to us for the EMPP
Regional EMPP Closed

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
